metadata.title:
MORE CARS.


FOR DIVISION

BUILDING OF NEW LINES
MEANS IMPROVED SERVICE


DUE BY SEPTEMBER

pages.raw_text:
With the building of the new car
lines on the north hill, 10 minute
car service or better is in sight for
Division street. The Washington
Water Power Co. now has its en-
gineers at work making surveys, for
the new lines to run north from
Liberty avenue On Division and Ad-
Olson street to Rowan avenue.
These lines will have independent
car service, separating at the juno
ture of Division and Liberty, There
will be at least 20 minute service
on each line and better If the traffic
warrants it, the company has as
sured the people.
Both lines will enter the city over
Division street, insuring for that
thoroughfare the bulk of the traffic
of the vast region to the north. It
will give Division street, Riverside
to Boone avenues, three car lines. as
the Aston line runs on Division to
Boone. The new Division and Ad-
Olson lines, which will replace the
LidgerwoGd lines, are required I'M
der the franchise to be in operation
by September 1 next.
